title: Update Parwati Dairy logo with new design

requirements.summary: Replace existing logo with new Parwati Dairy logo design featuring dairy products, pastoral farm scene, and decorative elements
acceptanceCriteria: New logo is displayed in the header/Layout component
New logo appears on the Home page hero section
Logo maintains proper aspect ratio and quality at different screen sizes
Logo integrates seamlessly with the existing warm dairy-themed color scheme

file_operations.description: Replace the existing logo image reference in the header with the new generated logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/parwati-dairy-logo.dim_800x800.png. Update the img src attribute and ensure responsive sizing (e.g., h-12 sm:h-16) maintains the logo's aspect ratio and visibility on both mobile and desktop viewports. Preserve all existing navigation functionality and header structure.

Replace the logo image in the hero section with the new generated logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/parwati-dairy-logo.dim_800x800.png. Update the img src attribute and ensure the logo displays prominently with appropriate sizing (e.g., max-w-xs sm:max-w-sm md:max-w-md) while maintaining aspect ratio. Verify the logo integrates visually with the existing warm dairy color scheme and hero layout without disrupting product navigation cards or features section.
